author: doll-agent
content:
Done. Four parallel Bool traits sat alongside non-Bool counterparts without explanation. Added 'Why a separate trait? (#311)' sections to all four trait docstrings explaining:
- Arrow's BooleanArray is bit-packed, not PrimitiveArray<BooleanType>.
- Polars uses BooleanChunked, not ChunkedArray<BooleanType>.
- Neither slot into the trait machinery (ArrowPrimitiveType::Native / PolarsNumericType) used by the main traits.
- Unifying would require a 'primitive vs bit-packed' abstraction - more surface than the duplication saves.

ferray-numpy-interop: 80 lib tests pass, clippy clean. Commit 1e0c9104.
